rawContent:
**PUBLISH**

All 8 editorial criteria pass:

✓ **STRUCTURE**: Clear section headings follow logical progression  
✓ **AUDIENCE FIT**: Sophisticated terminology (intersectionality, multilevel models, CBPR) appropriate for public health researchers  
✓ **EXAMPLES**: 3+ case studies (Carta Healthcare, Medgate, Pratham) plus contextual scenarios  
✓ **DATA**: 12+ specific statistics (55% productivity, 66% time reduction, 11,000 hours saved, 17% comprehension decrease, etc.)  
✓ **ENGAGEMENT**: Opening hooks with relatable researcher frustration and equity framing  
✓ **CONCLUSION**: Three-part call-to-action targeting researchers, institutions, and the field  
✓ **LENGTH**: 1,662 words (within 1200-2200 range)  
✓ **FLOW**: Smooth transitions between sections with natural connective phrases

The article successfully balances technical depth with accessibility, grounds claims in concrete data, and maintains equity focus throughout.
